item.title: ABC Trading Recalls WSDZ Light-up Glasses Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Battery Ingestion; Violate Mandatory Standard for Consumer Products with Button Cell Batteries
item.company: Starzzone and Igiftsinc and other gift stores nationwide from March 2024 through October 2025 for between $6 and $10.
item.brand: Starzzone and Igiftsinc and other gift stores nationwide from March 2024 through October 2025 for between $6 and $10.
item.summary: This recall involves WSDZ-branded LED shot glasses. The recalled plastic glasses are clear and have three button cell batteries in a compartment that power LED lights when the push button on the underside of the glass is pushed. The glasses were sold individually and in packs of 24 glasses. "ITEM NO: LP-024 (122)" and "Importer: ABC Trading, Inc" are printed on a label on the underside of the glasses.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: WSDZ Light-up Shot Glasses.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled glasses immediately, place them in an area where children cannot access them and properly dispose of the batteries. Contact ABC Trading for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to dispose of the glass and send a photo of the product in the trash and email to recallabc@gmail.com. Note: Button cell batteries are hazardous. Batteries should be disposed of or recycled by following local hazardous waste procedures.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
